result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (watertight), face normal consistency vs winding order (fixed threshold bug from provided validator), degenerate triangles, non-manifold edges, surface area, and triangle count.

result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (watertight), face normal consistency vs winding order (fixed threshold bug from provided validator), degenerate triangles, non-manifold edges, surface area, and triangle count.

manifest.name: STL Batch Validator
manifest.description: Validates a batch of ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (watertight), face normal consistency vs winding order (fixes -0.99 threshold bug), degenerate triangles, non-manifold edges. Produces a JSON report.
